title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at IRCTC Logistics - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at IRCTC Logistics - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
IRCTC Logistics invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Distribution Manager at our Noida location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About IRCTC Logistics:
IRCTC Logistics is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IRCTC Logistics!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
